summary: Completed comprehensive testing of ZET Mindshare editor UI updates. All 7 requested features verified as working correctly: separate panel toggles, document stats, equal column widths, centered navigation, logo positioning, and Turkish translation support.
passed_tests: ZET Mindshare logo correctly positioned in header right corner (X: 1872)
Navigation centered with page numbers only (1 / 1 format, no Back/Forward text)
Separate Pages panel collapse button working (data-testid='toggle-pages')
Separate ZETA panel collapse button working (data-testid='toggle-zeta')
Document stats displaying '1 pages • 21 chars' above pages panel
Equal column widths: both toolbox and right panel exactly 288px (w-72 class)
Tool names visible in English and Turkish translation system functional
Authentication working with test session token
All backend APIs (13/13) functioning at 100% success rate
Turkish language switching working (localStorage-based language selection)
